=Index of types=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="content"| type Page.content >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An abstract type describing the content of a page
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="current_user"| type Current_user.current_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Current_user >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="id"| type User.id >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type alias to <<a_api subproject="client" | type Types.User.id >> to allow to use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~User~.id>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="id"| type Types.Group.id >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Types.Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a group ~I~D
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="id"| type Types.User.id >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Types.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a user ~I~D
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="info"| type Types.Action_link_key.info >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Types.Action_link_key >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing information about the action link key
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="local_calendar"| type Date.local_calendar >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a local calendar~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="sms_error"| type Connect_phone.sms_error >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Connect_phone >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="sms_error_core"| type Connect_phone.sms_error_core >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~To be used for signalling errors with ~S~M~S transmission
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="t"| type User.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type alias to <<a_api subproject="client" | type Types.User.t >> to allow to use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~User~.t>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="t"| type Types.Group.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Types.Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a group~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="t"| type Types.User.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Types.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="t"| type Platform.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Platform >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="t"| type Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="t"| type Lib.Email_or_phone.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\Y|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="y"| type Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.y >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="y"| type Lib.Email_or_phone.y >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
\\
